haiku:
Strawberries aglow,
Warm chocolate cascades down,
Laughter fills the room.
Happy #EatWhatYouWantDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Whispers of starlight,
Twinkling dreams in soft twilight,
Time's gentle embrace.
Happy #TwilightZoneDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Balloons drift skyward,
Laughter weaves through sweet cake scents,
Songs bloom like spring’s heart.
#HappyBirthdayIrvingBerlin from @ClamBakeSanta

Swirls of dreamlike hues,
Melting clocks in soft twilight,
Art blooms in delight.
#HappyBirthdaySalvadorDali from @ClamBakeSanta
